name: Izou
description:
Izo is the commander of the 16th division of the Whitebeard Pirates. He is a cross-dressing man who wears a pink and purple kimono. He has a pale complexion and hair tied in a way resembling that of a geisha.
~!Now a former commander of the Whitebeard Pirates. He is also the older brother of [Kikunojo](https://anilist.co/character/127913/Kiku). Before becoming a member of the Whitebeard Pirates, he was a former resident of Wano Country, and the heir of his father's dancing school, Hanayanagi School in Ringo. Like Kiku, he is also associated with the Kozuki Family, namely Kozuki Oden, being one of his retainers.!~ (Source: One Piece Fandom)
